form.formComment: Most recently second last of 7 at this track on April 8 over 1200m, 13 len behind Sanatkar with 59kg at $10.85. Before that 9th of 11 at this track on April 1 over 2000m, 99 len behind Oguzbeyi carrying 61kg at $6.65. Cannot be ruled out despite a moderate effort last time.

form.formComment: Last start won by 1.1 len at Sanliurfa April 6 over 1800m defeating Babaguntay with 51.5kg at $26.20. The run before that 13th of 18 at Sanliurfa on March 11 over 1300m, 53 len behind Bizimsoy carrying 56.5kg at $9.40. In winning form but this a tough assignment.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run favourite; scored a big 4 len win at this track April 8 over 1200m defeating Bizimsoy carrying 57.5kg at $1.85. Before that 2nd of 12 at this track on April 1 over 1200m, 6 len behind Herzaman carrying 54kg at $17.05. Got the job done last time and is a leading hope again.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last preparation fourth of 11 at Sanliurfa December 24 over 1700m, 10 len behind Caputhan with 57.5kg at $5.45. On debut 12th of 14 at Diyarbakir July 5 over 1200m, 38 len behind Canrobin carrying 55kg at $13.40. Can return in winning form.

form.formComment: At the latest run favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.75 len at this track April 8 over 1200m defeating Nevalcicegi with 56.5kg at $4. The start before that 5th of 12 at Sanliurfa on March 30 over 1800m, 20 len behind Yerdeniz with 53kg at $4.55. Sure to go well again.
